description: Golgari Greta, Sweettooth Scourge deck with off-plan generic creatures, treasure producers, and non-sacrifice cards. Coherence gate should flag off-plan cards for Food/sacrifice plan.

commander.name: Greta, Sweettooth Scourge
commander.oracle_text: Whenever you sacrifice a Food, you gain 1 life and draw a card.

cards.name: Generic Combat Beater
cards.oracle_text: Trample. When this enters the battlefield, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

cards.name: Treasure Hoarder
cards.oracle_text: When this enters the battlefield, create a Treasure token.

cards.name: Clue Investigator
cards.oracle_text: Whenever you sacrifice a Clue, draw a card.

cards.name: Sacrifice Outlet
cards.oracle_text: Sacrifice a creature: you gain 2 life.

cards.name: Black Ramp
cards.oracle_text: Search your library for a Swamp card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
